Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like there's a good deal today.[n]Should I go to the police station...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like there's something for me at the[n]police station. Should I go there now...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've already taken care of this. Should I go[n]to the police station again anyway...?[n]{f 1 1}
